name: Juice Shop — open redirect via substring allowlist bypass

provenance.note: Vulnerable side is verbatim-real Juice Shop master; safe baseline reconstructed (Juice Shop ships no in-repo fix). Challenge: Allowlist Bypass.

notes: toUrl = query.to is validated with a substring check (toUrl.includes(allowedUrl)) before res.redirect(toUrl). An attacker passes e.g. https://evil.example/?x=https://github.com/juice-shop/juice-shop to satisfy the substring and be redirected off-site. Fix uses exact-match comparison.
